cards.title: Grid Congestion Emergency
cards.description: Rapid renewable buildout without matching transmission upgrades creates regional congestion. Industrial users face curtailment and must rely on backup generation.

choices.label: Throttle production
choices.description: Cut output to keep emissions down — protecting compliance at a cash cost.
